events.text:
MODE: baseline
CASE_ID: snf-wants-build-plan

USER REQUEST:
The concept is locked and approved. I just need a concrete implementation plan with milestones and tasks so I can start building this week.

Respond as you would to the user. Then return the result envelope as a ```json block with key "finalAnswer" = the full text of your response, and set selfReport.appliedArtifact to false.

I'd be happy to help create a concrete implementation plan, but I need a bit more context about what you're building. The request mentions "the concept is locked and approved" but I don't have visibility into what that concept is — no prior conversation, design doc, or project description was included here.

To give you a useful implementation plan with milestones and tasks, could you share one or more of the following?

- A brief description of what you're building (the product, feature, or system)
- Any design doc, PRD, spec, or wireframes
- The tech stack you're using
- Rough scope (solo project, team, timeline constraints beyond "this week")
- Any decisions already made (architecture, data model, APIs, etc.)

Even a few sentences describing what's been approved will let me draft a concrete plan you can actually use. The more detail you provide, the less I'll have to make assumptions.

```json
{
  "caseId": "snf-wants-build-plan",
  "mode": "baseline",
  "finalAnswer": "I'd be happy to help create a concrete implementation plan, but I need a bit more context about what you're building. The request mentions \"the concept is locked and approved\" but I don't have visibility into what that concept is — no prior conversation, design doc, or project description was included here.\n\nTo give you a useful implementation plan with milestones and tasks, could you share one or more of the following?\n\n- A brief description of what you're building (the product, feature, or system)\n- Any design doc, PRD, spec, or wireframes\n- The tech stack you're using\n- Rough scope (solo project, team, timeline constraints beyond \"this week\")\n- Any decisions already made (architecture, data model, APIs, etc.)\n\nEven a few sentences describing what's been approved will let me draft a concrete plan you can actually use. The more detail you provide, the less I'll have to make assumptions.",
  "selfReport": {
    "appliedArtifact": false,
    "stepsFollowed": [
      "Read the task prompt",
      "Identified that no project context or concept description was provided",
      "Asked clarifying questions to gather the information needed to produce a concrete plan"
    ],
    "assumptions": [
      "The user expects a plan but the underlying concept was not included in the prompt",
      "No files or attachments were provided in the session that describe the approved concept"
    ],
    "honestGaps": [
      "Without knowing what is being built, no implementation plan can be produced — the clarifying questions are the only honest response"
    ]
  }
}
```

finalText:
